title: pleopeltis orientalis
intro: Pleopeltis orientalis, also known as the Chinese climbing fern or Oriental climbing fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pleopeltis orientalis include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm digestive issues, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Pleopeltis orientalis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
